subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The letters thou didst dispatch unto the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامهاهای مرسله که بساحت اقدس ارسال نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
